meta.release_notes:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [Unreleased]

## [1.0.0] - 2023-05-08
### Added
- initial model

### Changed
n/a

### Removed

nodes.label: SealantPass
nodes.description: The Sealant Passport represents the needs from manufacturers of chemical substance and mixtures. It describes data required by the safety data sheet (SDS) - which is based on the REACH Regulation No 1907/2006 in the format of a DPP.

nodes.label: documents
nodes.description: Set of documents containing the description of components.

nodes.label: performanceProperties
nodes.description: Describes the performance and durability of a substance or mixture.

nodes.label: productIdentification
nodes.description: Identification of the substance/mixture and of the company/undertaking.

nodes.label: application
nodes.description: Relevant identified uses of the substance or mixture and uses advised against.

nodes.label: supplier
nodes.description: Supplier of the mixture or substance.

nodes.label: hazardsIdentification
nodes.description: Describes the hazards of the substance or mixture and the appropriate warning information associated with those hazards.

nodes.label: productComposition
nodes.description: Information on the ingredients.

nodes.label: safetyMeasure
nodes.description: Describes measures related to the safe handling of the mixtures and substances.

nodes.label: productProperties
nodes.description: Describes the physical and chemical properties of the substance or mixture.

nodes.label: productDisposal
nodes.description: Describes the proper disposal of the product.

nodes.label: transportInformation
nodes.description: Describes transport relevant information.

nodes.label: regulatoryInformation
nodes.description: Describes the regulatory data points.

nodes.label: carbonFootprint
nodes.description: Describes the carbon footprint of the substance or mixture based on the Ecodesign.

nodes.label: localIdentifiers
nodes.description: A local identifier enables identification of a part in a specific data space, but is not unique in Catena-X data space. Multiple local identifiers may exist.

nodes.label: crossSectoralStandardsUsed
nodes.description: Discloses the cross-sectoral standards applied for calculating or allocating GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions as specified by the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development) Pathfinder initiative.

nodes.label: productOrSectorSpecificRules
nodes.description: Product or sector specific rules applied for calculating or allocating GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions, e.g. PCRs (Product Category Rules), including operators or pubishers and according rule names. Specified by the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development) Pathfinder initiative.

nodes.label: declarationOfConformity
nodes.description: Declaration of conformity (CE) is describing a regulatory requirement from the EU.

nodes.label: removalProcedure
nodes.description: The documents explain the removal and possible recycling options of the product.

nodes.label: dueDiligence
nodes.description: Report on supply chain due diligence policies. Link to document or website on its supply chain due diligence policies.

nodes.label: technicalDocumentation
nodes.description: Technical documentation refers to documents that explain the use, functionality, creation, or architecture of the product.

nodes.label: safetyDataSheet
nodes.description: A link to the full seafty data sheet of the material. A link to a SDS might be provided for several countries and possibly multiple languages for each country. The table includes: version, country name, language of the document and the link to the document. The documents should preferably be provided as PDF or Word document.

nodes.label: sustainabilityReport
nodes.description: Link to public website or document. Reporting in accordance with the new European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS) including the new ESG reporting standards.

nodes.label: curingTime
nodes.description: Cure time is the time that determines how long it will take for the material to fully cure. A number of chemical reactions occur during this time, for the material to harden. It can take a long time for a material to fully cure.

nodes.label: tradeName
nodes.description: Trade name given to the chemical substance or mixture as part of the product identification.

nodes.label: productCode
nodes.description: Product Code given to the Substance/mixture as part of the product identification.

nodes.label: reachRegistration
nodes.description: A REACH registration number is an 18-digit number assigned by the European Chemicals Agency (ECHA).

nodes.label: substanceName
nodes.description: Name given to the substance.

nodes.label: casNumber
nodes.description: A CAS registry number is a unique identification number assigned by the Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS).

nodes.label: ecNumber
nodes.description: The European Commission number (EC number), is the code assigned to chemical substances that are commercially available within the European Union.

nodes.label: indexNumber
nodes.description: The index number is used as an identifier.

nodes.label: usage
nodes.description: Brief description of the identified uses of the substance or mixture relevant for the recipient(s).

nodes.label: recommendedUse
nodes.description: Recommended restrictions on use

nodes.label: emergencyNumber
nodes.description: Suppliers emergency telephone number for information services.

nodes.label: supplierId
nodes.description: BPNL of the supplier.

nodes.label: classificationGHS
nodes.description: The classification of the substance or the mixture which results from the application of the classification criteria in Regulation (EC) No 1272/2008 shall be given.

nodes.label: possibleHazards
nodes.description: A description of the various toxicological (health) effects and the available data used to identify those effects (SDS Section 11.1).

nodes.label: hazardousIngredients
nodes.description: Ingredients classified as hazardous (SDS Section 12.1).

nodes.label: substance
nodes.description: Property to describes a substance.

nodes.label: mixture
nodes.description: Property to describes the mixture.

nodes.label: firstAid
nodes.description: First aid instructions are provided by relevant routes of exposure (SDS Section 4.1).

nodes.label: fireExtinguisher
nodes.description: Suitable extinguishing media,  for fighting a fire caused by the substance or mixture, or arising in its vicinity (SDS Section 5.1).

nodes.label: personalPrecaution
nodes.description: Information about the appropriate response to spills, leaks, or releases, to prevent or minimize the adverse effects on persons, property and the environment (SDS Section 6.1).

nodes.label: technicalMeasures
nodes.description: Information is provided concerning protective measures for safe handling and recommended technical measures (SDS Section 7.1).

nodes.label: exposureLimit
nodes.description: Information about the applicable exposure limits of the substances and mixtures (SDS Section 8.1).

nodes.label: physicalState
nodes.description: Describes the physical state (gas, liquid or solid) at standard conditions of temperature and pressure.

nodes.label: colour
nodes.description: The colour of the substance or mixture as supplied is indicated.

nodes.label: odour
nodes.description: A qualitative description of the odour is shown if it is well-known or described in the literature.

nodes.label: pH
nodes.description: The pH of the substance or mixture as supplied, or where the product is a solid, the pH of an aqueous liquid or solution at a given concentration, shall be indicated.

nodes.label: phaseTransition
nodes.description: Phase Transition temperature from liquid to gas.

nodes.label: flashPoint
nodes.description: For mixtures, a value for the mixture shall be indicated, if available. Otherwise, the flash point of the substance with the lowest flash point shall be indicated.

nodes.label: density
nodes.description: Density and relative density shall generally be indicated at standard conditions of temperature and pressure.

nodes.label: reactivity
nodes.description: Reactivity hazards of the substance or mixtures.

nodes.label: wasteManagement
nodes.description: Waste management of the substance or mixture and/or its container to assist in the determination of safe and environmentally preferred waste management options.

nodes.label: wasteInformation
nodes.description: Waste treatment-relevant information.

nodes.label: unNumber
nodes.description: The UN number or the ID number (i.e. the four-figure identification number of the substance, mixture or article preceded by the letters ‘UN’ or ‘ID’) from the UN Model Regulations, IMDG, ADR, RID, ADN or ICAO TI shall be provided.

nodes.label: shippingName
nodes.description: A proper shipping name.

nodes.label: dgClass
nodes.description: The transport hazard class (and subsidiary risks) assigned to the substances or mixtures on the basis of the predominant hazard that they present according to the UN Model Regulations shall be provided.

nodes.label: dgPack
nodes.description: The packing group number from the UN Model Regulations shall be provided, if applicable, as required by the UN Model Regulations, ADR, RID and ADN.

nodes.label: limitations
nodes.description: Information shall be provided regarding relevant Union safety, health and environmental provisions including the prohibitions and restrictions.

nodes.label: co2FootprintTotal
nodes.description: The total carbon footprint, calculated as kg of carbon dioxide equivalent.

nodes.label: documentTitle
nodes.description: The header or title of the document.

nodes.label: documentLocation
nodes.description: Location or link of and to the document.

nodes.label: documentLanguage
nodes.description: Language of the safety data sheet (SDS) document.

nodes.label: documentVersion
nodes.description: Version of the document.

nodes.label: provisioningCountry
nodes.description: The country from where the documentation is issued from.

nodes.label: otherInformation
nodes.description: Additional information relevant to the safety data sheet (SDS) document.

nodes.label: manufactureId
nodes.description: Unique BPN number.

nodes.label: indicationChanges
nodes.description: in the case of a revised safety data sheet (SDS), a clear indication of where changes have been made to the previous version of the safety data sheet (SDS).

nodes.label: authorSDS
nodes.description: safety data sheet (SDS) author changing the document.

nodes.label: chemicalName
nodes.description: Name of the chemical.

nodes.label: chemicalPercentage
nodes.description: Describes chemical distribution in percentage. It can include a percentage range. Either 10% or 5,5%-6% . Allowed are decimal values with a "," separator. Mandatory are no spaces between the values and the percentage character.

nodes.label: composition
nodes.description: Describes the chemical identity of the ingredient(s) of the substance or mixture.

nodes.label: chemicalNature
nodes.description: Chemical nature of the mixture or substance.

nodes.label: Document
nodes.description: Set of documents containing the description of chemical substances and mixture components.

nodes.label: PerformanceCharacteristic
nodes.description: Set of measures linked to the performance and durability of the mixtures and substances.

nodes.label: ProductIdentificationCharacteristic
nodes.description: Set of information to identify the product.

nodes.label: ApplicationCharacteristic
nodes.description: Set of information referring to the application of the substance and mixture.

nodes.label: SupplierCharacteristic
nodes.description: Set of information to identify the supplier.

nodes.label: HazardsIdentification
nodes.description: Set of information to identify the hazards.

nodes.label: ProductComposition
nodes.description: Set of information displaying the product composition.

nodes.label: SafetyMeasureCharacteristic
nodes.description: Set of information referring to safety measures.

nodes.label: ProductProperties
nodes.description: Set of information describing the physical and chemical properties.

nodes.label: ProductDisposal
nodes.description: Set of information describing the proper disposal of the product.

nodes.label: TransportInformation
nodes.description: Set of information describing the transport information.

nodes.label: RegulatoryInformationCharacteristic
nodes.description: Set of information regarding the regulations.

nodes.label: CarbonFootprint
nodes.description: Set of information needed for the carbon footprint ecodesign regulations.

nodes.label: PhCharacteristic
nodes.description: Provides a range or a pH value.

nodes.label: DocumentEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the details of a attachment for the chemical substances and mixtures of the pass.

nodes.label: PerformanceEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the measures of the performance and durability.

nodes.label: ProductIdentificationEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the product identification.

nodes.label: ApplicationEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the substance or mixtures application.

nodes.label: SupplierEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the information from the supplier.

nodes.label: HazardsIdentificationEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the hazards on a substance or mixture.

nodes.label: ProductCompositionEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the product composition information.

nodes.label: SafetyMeasureEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the safety measures.

nodes.label: ProductPropertyEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the product properties.

nodes.label: ProductDisposalEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the information needed for the product disposal.

nodes.label: TransportInformationEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the transport information data.

nodes.label: RegulatoryInformationEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the regulatory information.

nodes.label: CarbonFootprintEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the carbon footprint.

nodes.label: LocateEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the details from the documents title and location.

nodes.label: SpecificsSDSEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the details from the safety data sheet (SDS) documentation.

nodes.label: IngredientsEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the ingredients.

nodes.label: ChemicalCompositionEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the chemical composition and nature.

nodes.label: OtherInformationEntity
nodes.description: Entity encapsulating the required information.

nodes.label: LocateCharacteristic
nodes.description: Connects the title and location of the document.

nodes.label: SpecificsSDSCharacteristic
nodes.description: Connects the safety data sheet (SDS) version, language, and country.

nodes.label: ListOfIngredients
nodes.description: Describes the amount of each individual chemical.

nodes.label: ChemicalComposition
nodes.description: Characteristic combining the chemical composition for a mixture and a substance.

nodes.label: OtherInformationCharacteristic
nodes.description: Describes additional information, in a set of values.

nodes.label: CuringTime
nodes.description: Time in seconds needed for the curing of the substance or mixture.

nodes.label: ReachRegistrationTrait
nodes.description: Constraints the value to two digits followed by an - followed by ten digits followed by an - followed by two digits followed by an - and four digits.

nodes.label: CasNumberTrait
nodes.description: Constraints the value to four digits followed by an - followed by two digits followed by an - and one digit.

nodes.label: EcNumberTrait
nodes.description: Constraints the value to three digits followed by an - followed by three digits followed by an - and one digit.

nodes.label: IndexNumberTrait
nodes.description: Constraints the value to three digits followed by an - followed by three digits followed by an - followed by two digits followed by an - and one digit.

nodes.label: UsageTrait
nodes.description: Constraint to allow only numbers, blanks and an optional leading + sign.

nodes.label: DocumentTitleTrait
nodes.description: Constraints the length to 60 characters.

nodes.label: ProvisioningCountryTrait
nodes.description: Constraints the value to to three letters based on the ISO 3166 standard.

nodes.label: ChemicalPercentageTrait
nodes.description: Constraints the value to a percentage range. Either 10% or 5.5%-6% . Allowed are decimal values with a dot as separator. Mandatory are no spaces between the values and the percentage character.

nodes.label: PhysicalState
nodes.description: Enumeration with three physical states: gas, liquid and solid.

nodes.label: Degree
nodes.description: The temperature in its phase.

nodes.label: Density
nodes.description: Describes the density of the product.

nodes.label: Co2Total
nodes.description: Describes the amount of kg of the CO2 equivalent.

nodes.label: ReachRegistrationRegex
nodes.description: Describes the regex expression for the Reach Registration number. Constraints the value to two digits followed by an - followed by ten digits followed by an - followed by two digits followed by an - and four digits.

nodes.label: CASNumberConstraint
nodes.description: Describes the Regex expression for the CAS number. Constraints the value to four digits followed by an - followed by two digits followed by an - and one digit.

nodes.label: ECNumberRegex
nodes.description: Describes the regex expression for the EC number. Constraints the value to three digits followed by an - followed by three digits followed by an - and one digit.

nodes.label: IndexNumberRegex
nodes.description: Describes the regex expression for the Index number. Constraints the value to three digits followed by an - followed by three digits followed by an - followed by two digits followed by an - and one digit.

nodes.label: TelephoneNumberRegex
nodes.description: Constraint to allow only numbers, blanks and an optional leading + sign.

nodes.label: ChemicalDistribution
nodes.description: Describes chemical distribution in percentage. It can include a percentage range. Either 10% or 5.5%-6% . Allowed are decimal values with a dot as separator. Mandatory are no spaces between the values and the percentage character.

nodes.label: DocumentVersionCharacteristic
nodes.description: Refers to the version of the safety data sheet (SDS) document.

nodes.label: ProvisioningCountry
nodes.description: Refers to the country of the safety data sheet (SDS) provisioner.

nodes.label: MaxTitleCharacterConstraint
nodes.description: Maximum title characters set to 60.

nodes.label: ISOCodeConstraint
nodes.description: Length of the text is capped to three letters based on the ISO 3166 standard.
